markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, refine strategy, and plan for efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Comparison Articles:** Understory will provide a target competitor list (e.g., ColdIQ, AdConversion) to replace the current data-driven selection, ensuring articles target relevant agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Performance Shift:** Weekly performance updates will become monthly deep-dives starting in January to provide a more strategic, big-picture view.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [**Content Sync:** GrowthX will create companion blog posts for Understory's new YouTube series to cross-promote content once a publishing schedule is available.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Process Efficiency:** GrowthX will explore auto-publishing to Sanity to streamline the workflow, reducing manual steps and speeding up publication.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**November Performance:** Strong signals continue, with all content pillars showing session growth.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** Benchmark/thought leadership content is driving the most traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Engagement:** \~50% engagement rate (30+ seconds on page) is excellent for this early stage, indicating high content value.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [**Comparison Article Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "Best B2B Agencies in 2025" article featured irrelevant agencies, as the current selection process is data-driven (based on search ranking) rather than strategic (targeting direct competitors).](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Solution:** Understory will provide a specific list of competitors to target in future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
          - [**Initial Suggestions:** ColdIQ, AdConversion, OmniLabs, The Kiln.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
          - [**Guideline:** Keep articles to \~10 companies to maintain readability.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [**YouTube Content Sync:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Understory Initiative:** Launching a long-form YouTube series with a new consultant.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**GrowthX Support:** Will create companion blog posts to cross-promote content and drive traffic once a publishing schedule is available.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [**Reddit Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Test a strategy of claiming the Understory Reddit tag and repurposing blog content as long-form posts on the main page.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach avoids the high moderation effort of a full subreddit. Understory is open to the experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**AEO (AI Engine Optimization) & Backlinks:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**AEO Strategy:** GrowthX already optimizes content with rich, definitional snippets to increase the likelihood of being cited by LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
      - [**Backlinks & Directories:** Understory noted the importance of directory listings for LLM ranking. GrowthX will research if this falls within scope and provide guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

### Process & Logistics

  - [**Auto-Publishing to Sanity:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Explore setting up an auto-publishing pipeline from GrowthX's system directly to Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase efficiency by staging content for a one-day review before publication, reducing manual steps.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
      - [**Decision:** Switch to bi-weekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
      - [**Plan:** GrowthX will send an async update next week (Dec 11) in place of a call. The next sync will be the week before Christmas.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Deliver LinkedIn charts and talking points.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Integrate Understory's topic recommendations for December.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Research Reddit experiment feasibility and provide guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [Research backlink/directory support scope.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Send async update next week (Dec 11).](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [**Ali & Alex:**](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Provide a definitive competitor list for comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Share the YouTube publishing schedule when ready.](https://fathom.video/share/7Cj58667BLcmpKykr4cGvmsgomr-ihSL?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
